whyMorocco.title: Why Morocco
whyMorocco.gdp: GDP growth consistently above 3% — one of Africa's most stable economies.
whyMorocco.fdi: FDI inflows reaching $3.6B in 2023, driven by the Charte de l'Investissement 2022.
whyMorocco.nadWestMed: Nador West Med: Africa's largest deep-water port complex, attracting €12B in industrial investment.

whyBenaribi.title: Why Benaribi Agence
whyBenaribi.local: Deep local expertise in Nador West Med — market knowledge no international firm can replicate.
whyBenaribi.fiscal: Integrated fiscal and legal advisory — one interlocutor for the full investment lifecycle.
whyBenaribi.track: Proven track record with HNWI and institutional clients across Europe and the Gulf.

body.description: Benaribi Agence connects international investors with high-quality residential assets in Nador and surrounding regions, providing end-to-end transaction support from property identification to notarial completion.

hero.title: Industrial Real Estate
hero.subtitle: Industrial land and facilities within Africa's most ambitious free zone.

body.description: Nador West Med offers unparalleled logistics infrastructure for industrial investors. Benaribi Agence guides you through site selection, CRI negotiations, and fiscal structuring within the zone.
benefits: Direct access to Nador West Med free zone parcels
Logistics and supply chain connectivity advice

hero.title: Company Setup
hero.subtitle: From incorporation to full fiscal compliance — we handle it all.

body.description: Setting up a business entity in Morocco requires navigating OMPIC registration, CNSS obligations, and the Charte de l'Investissement 2022 incentives. Benaribi Agence coordinates the full process with local legal partners.
benefits: SARL and SA incorporation in 6–16 weeks
OMPIC, CNSS, and tax authority registration
Banking relationship setup and capital import

hero.title: Invest in Morocco
hero.subtitle: The Charte de l'Investissement 2022 — Understanding Your Fiscal Advantage

landscape.title: Morocco's Investment Landscape
landscape.charte: The Charte de l'Investissement 2022 (Law 03-22) establishes a new framework of tax exemptions, grants, and streamlined procedures for foreign and domestic investors.
landscape.nwm: Nador West Med positions Morocco as a Mediterranean industrial hub, with €12B committed across logistics, industry, and real estate.

calculator.title: ROI Fiscal Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Get an indicative fiscal estimate for your Morocco investment.

results.title: Your Indicative Fiscal Estimate
results.treatyBonus: Treaty Advantage: Morocco has a tax treaty with your country of origin — withholding tax exemptions may apply.

calculator.disclaimer: These estimates are indicative only and do not constitute legal or fiscal advice. Consult a qualified advisor before making investment decisions.

validation.capitalPositive: Capital must be a positive number.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Benaribi Agence was founded to bridge the gap between international capital and Morocco's most dynamic investment zone. Based in Nador, at the gateway to Nador West Med, we combine deep local market knowledge with institutional-grade advisory standards.

positioning.title: Our Positioning
positioning.text: We serve HNWIs, family offices, and industrial companies seeking exposure to Morocco's high-growth economy — providing the same level of rigour and discretion as the world's leading real estate advisors, with unmatched local presence.

lead.name: Benaribi Agence Advisory Team
lead.bio: Specialised in Nador West Med industrial investment and Morocco cross-border fiscal structuring.
